title: Improved Vanilla
description: A modpack that aims to enhance the Vanilla Minecraft experience.
body:
# Improved Vanilla

Improved Vanilla is a modpack that aims to create an enhanced Vanilla Minecraft experience better, by improving the graphics, render distance, sounds, A few textures, and physics. All while keeping the game as close as possible to Vanilla Minecraft.

### Mods
A few of the used mods/rescource packs/shaders are:
- Complementary Reimagined,
- Euphoria Patches,
- Sodium,
- Iris,
- Distant horizons, 
- Physics mod,
- Charmonium,
- Fresh animations,
- Detailed animations,
- Essentials,
- Tectonic.

To see the full list of mods click the version you want en scroll down.

### Features
A few key features of this modpack are: 
- Improved visuals (thanks to Complementary Reimagined and Euphoria Patches), 
- Biome specific portal colors in the nether (thanks to Euphoria Patches), 
- Being able to slash mobs through Grass (thanks to SwingThrough), 
- An increased render distance (thanks to distant horizons), 
- Better animations for the Player and mobs (thanks to Detailed animations and Fresh animations),      
- Improved world generation (thanks to Tectonic)

If you are interested in discovering the other features, I strongly recommend you download and try out Improved Vanilla.



### Performance
Improved Vanilla is tested on:

RX 6600,Ryzen 5 3600,10/16 GB of RAM, 1080p, at around 90-120 fps while idle depending on the biome and activity and at around 70-100 fps while moving around and loading chunks depending on the biome and moving speed.

### Note
I recommend that you use a similair or better setup as me, otherwise your game might not run smoothly. If that is the case, try out [Improved Vanilla Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/improved-vanilla-lite), a tuned down version of Improved Vanilla with (almost) all of the same features. Also feel free to play around with different settings to see what you prefer and what works best for you. 

### Disclaimer
The mods, rescource packs and shaders used are not made by me, and I claim no rights to any of the mods, resource packs or shaders contained within this pack. Please support the creators of all the mods, resource packs and shaders in any way you can.
